description: You have joined a project where the source docker-compose.yml has been lost, but the application is currently running in Docker. Reconstruct a fully functional docker-compose.yml file at ~/projects/inventory-tracker/docker-compose.yml by reverse-engineering the configuration of the four running containers: inv-db, inv-cache, inv-api, and inv-web. The configuration must explicitly define the discovered images, environment variables, networks, volumes, ports, and start commands, ensuring the custom inv-api image is correctly referenced. After creating the file, stop the original containers and restart the application using the new compose file so that it is accessible at http://localhost:8080/api/items.
